channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Combat your post-Super Bowl fatigue with these freebies, discounts
item.description: Even though the Super Bowl is over, several restaurants and chains are offering freebies to help football fans recover from Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge finds Trump administration hasn’t fully followed his order to unfreeze federal spending
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge found Monday that the Trump administration hasn’t fully followed his order to unfreeze federal spending and told the White House to release billions of dollars in funding. The Trump administration quickly appealed the ruling. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Virginia court overturns felony convictions against Tiger King star 'Doc' Antle
item.description: "Doc" Antle was convicted in June 2023 on two counts each of purchasing an endangered species and conspiracy to sell or purchase an endangered species.
item.dc:creator: Adam Benson, NewsNation

item.title: What the Westminster show dogs' names mean
item.description: They have names that could make a random password generator cry uncle. Meet, for example, GCHG CH Calicops Sassafras Gonnakikurass. “She’s a saucy girl. Her name says it all,” Fred Ortiz said as he groomed the Brussels griffon to compete Monday at the Westminster Kennel Club dog show.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Billions in unspent aid lacks oversight after Trump targets USAID, watchdog warns
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. Agency for International Development has lost almost all ability to track $8.2 billion in unspent humanitarian aid following the Trump administration’s foreign funding freeze and idling of staffers, a government watchdog warned Monday.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hoarder arrested for extreme animal cruelty, as authorities discover 10 dead pets, rescue many more: police
item.description: A Long Island woman was arrested and charged with animal cruelty and other charges after a search warrant on her residence revealed unlivable conditions for dozens of animals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona has added an endangered bat to the list of night-flying creatures that frequent the state
item.description: FLAGSTAFF, Ariz. (AP) — Scientists have long suspected that Mexican long-nosed bats migrate through southeastern Arizona, but without capturing and measuring the night-flying creatures, proof has been elusive.
item.dc:creator: TY ONEIL and FELICIA FONSECA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US judge keeps Trump plan to push out federal workers on hold
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's plan to downsize the federal workforce remains on hold after a courtroom hearing on Monday afternoon. It's the latest example of how the Republican president's ambitious plans have become ensnared in the judicial system. U.S. District Judge George O’Toole Jr.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump: Palestinians will have no right of return to Gaza under US proposal
item.description: No, they wouldn’t,” Trump declared. “In other words, I'm talking about building a permanent place for them.
item.dc:creator: Tanya Noury, NewsNation

item.title: Los Angeles family featured in Super Bowl commercial
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Taco Bell marked its return to the Super Bowl with a commercial that featured nearly 400 fans, including a couple from Los Angeles and their newborn baby.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Catalytic converters stolen from Illinois district's school buses, forcing students to stay home
item.description: A suburban Illinois school district was forced to hold an emergency e-learning day after the catalytic converters were stolen from "over 80%" of its buses.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hawaii court rules against insurance companies in Maui wildfire, allowing $4B settlement to proceed
item.description: Hawaii’s Supreme Court has ruled that insurance companies can’t bring their own legal actions against those blamed for Maui’s catastrophic 2023 wildfire, the deadliest in the U.S. in more than a century.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Sinco Kelleher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: So long, penny! Trump orders US to ditch 1-cent coin after decades of complaints
item.description: RICHMOND, Va. (AP) — The lowly penny, the forgotten mainstay of coin jars and car cupholders everywhere, may soon be no more. President Donald Trump announced Sunday he’s ordered his administration to cease production of the 1-cent coin, whose buying power is long past its prime.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Brother of Parkland shooter arrested for trespassing at three schools
item.description: Surveillance footage recovered from Jan. 25 showed him attempting to open exterior doors and peering into the schools.
item.dc:creator: Ciara Sutherland, NewsNation

item.title: Protester speaks after being hit by car during Salt Lake City demonstration
item.description: Padilla-Oliver said the driver slowed down and stopped, after which she "stood with pride" and held her sign.
item.dc:creator: MJ Jewkes, NewsNation

item.title: DeWine picks ex-Ohio State football coach for lieutenant governor
item.description: DeWine lauded Tressel as a “born leader” who "has the ability to pull people together" and shares the governor’s “vision for the future of the state of Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Combat your post-Super Bowl fatigue with these freebies, discounts
item.description: Even though the Super Bowl is over, several restaurants and chains are offering freebies to help football fans recover from Sunday. Here’s what you need to know. Starbucks The coffee chain is offering its rewards members a free tall hot or iced brewed coffee any time during “Starbucks Monday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Scientists warn Trump's medical research cuts endanger patients as judge blocks the move for now
item.description: Scientists warn the Trump administration’s drastic cuts for medical research endanger patients, will cost thousands of jobs and threaten America’s standing as a world leader in science and innovation.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Video: Rare ‘Black Demon’ fish spotted alive for first time
item.description: The scary-looking fish is usually found in water depths of 1,500 meters, where little to no sunlight reaches.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, NewsNation

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump sued after quietly firing top whistleblower protector
item.description: President Trump late Friday fired the leader of an office designed to protect government whistleblowers, a detail revealed in a Monday lawsuit from the head of the Office of the Special Counsel (OSC).
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Former Buckeyes football coach Jim Tressel nominated as Ohio's lieutenant governor
item.description: Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine is nominating former Ohio State Buckeyes football coach Jim Tressel as the state's next lieutenant governor.
item.dc:creator: Julie Carr Smyth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 6 hidden messages in Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl performance
item.description: Kendrick Lamar’s Super Bowl halftime performance is growing in viewership hours after the big game, gaining more than 11 million views since it aired Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, WGN 9

item.title: Blue state Democrats spearhead bills to crack down on campus antisemitism
item.description: More than a year after the Oct. 7 Hamas terror attack on Israel sparked U.S. campus protests, New York lawmakers propose a crackdown on hate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Toddler safe as Byhalia, MS barricade situation ends
item.description: MARSHALL COUNTY, Miss. -- A man is in custody and a toddler safe after an overnight barricade situation that lasted for hours at a home on Highway 309 in Byhalia, Mississippi. According to the Marshall County Sheriff's Office, a mother, father and toddler were inside a home.
item.dc:creator: Deja Davis, NewsNation

item.title: GOP senators 'terrified' of crossing Trump, facing Musk-funded challengers
item.description: GOP senators are "terrified" over the prospect of facing primary challengers funded by Elon Musk if they stick their necks out by opposing President Donald Trump's agenda.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Senate Democrats launch portal for whistleblowers in Trump administration
item.description: Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) and Sen. Gary Peters (D-Mich.), the ranking member of the Senate Homeland Security Committee, said they are launching a new portal for whistleblowers to expose wrongdoing and abuses of power in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KRON4

item.title: Trump tells Treasury Department to stop making pennies
item.description: President Trump claims he has instructed the U.S. Treasury Department to stop producing pennies, calling the 1-cent coin wasteful.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: President Trump's message for Chiefs, Taylor Swift after Super Bowl LIX and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black educators warn of what is lost if Education Department is shuttered
item.description: Black educators are sounding the alarm as President Donald Trump ramps up talk of eliminating the Department of Education.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Figure skating mom starts Skates of Hope to honor DC plane crash victims
item.description: A North Carolina mom is honoring those who died in the American Airlines flight that crashed into an Army helicopter by helping the skating community.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USPS employee sentenced to prison after stealing $24 million worth of checks: officials
item.description: Former U.S. Postal Service employee Nakedra Shannon was sentenced to prison after she and co-conspirators stole over $24 million worth of mailed checks, according to officials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says 25 percent tariffs on steel and aluminum coming Monday
item.description: Trump said that the steel and aluminum tariffs would impact “everybody” when asked what countries would be affected.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4
